text.title: cross-platform-token-distribution Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cross-platform-token-distribution as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using rem values in iOS or dp values in CSS output.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Style Dictionary transforms are unit-and-platform-aware but trip on edge cases; always specify the unit transform explicitly per platform.

failure-mode.description: Relying on Tokens Studio JSON being W3C-compatible without validation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tokens Studio JSON dialect drifts from the W3C draft; round-tripping breaks alias references unless validated on each export.

failure-mode.description: Semantic token aliasing across platforms expecting one-level resolution.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Android XML resolves only one level deep without custom resolvers; deep alias chains silently produce wrong values.

failure-mode.description: Agent writes Style Dictionary transforms against the deprecated v3 API.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Style Dictionary v4 has a different transform API; v3 transforms silently produce no output or malformed files.

failure-mode.description: Generated SCSS maps use Dart Sass-deprecated syntax (e.g., misplaced !default).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Newer Dart Sass deprecations surface only at build time; lint generated SCSS before committing.

failure-mode.description: Color-space metadata (sRGB vs. P3) is dropped during token transform.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Transforms silently coerce color spaces; require explicit color-space metadata in the source and validate output format.

failure-mode.description: Agent invents Tokens Studio capabilities (e.g., "math expressions") not in current docs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hallucinated features produce pipeline configs that break at runtime; validate all claimed features against current Tokens Studio documentation.

failure-mode.description: Agent prunes "unused" tokens automatically using static analysis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Static analysis misses theming, runtime, and per-tenant token references; auto-pruning causes silent regressions.
